---
name: Doctrine Gap
about: Record a missing doctrine element or conceptual inconsistency
title: "[Doctrine Gap] "
labels: ["doctrine", "status:draft"]

---

## Gap Summary
What doctrine element is missing, weak, or internally inconsistent?

## Why It Matters
What breaks if this remains unresolved?

## Boundary Affected
What system boundary, operating principle, or invariant does this affect?

## Proposed Addition or Repair
What should be added, clarified, or constrained?

## Evidence / Examples
What examples or prior artifacts suggest this gap is real?

## Done Condition
What would make this issue complete?
